mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DAILY_TOTAL_DATA ( usage_date, line_id, total_usage_data, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{usageDate}, #{lineId}, #{usedBytes}, NOW(6), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_usage_data = total_usage_data + VALUES(total_usage_data), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6)

INSERT INTO DAILY_APP_TOTAL_DATA ( usage_date, line_id, application_id, total_usage_data, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{usageDate}, #{lineId}, #{appId}, #{usedBytes}, NOW(6), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_usage_data = total_usage_data + VALUES(total_usage_data), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6)

INSERT INTO FAMILY_SHARED_USAGE_DAILY ( usage_date, family_id, line_id, usage_amount, contribution_amount, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{usageDate}, #{familyId}, #{lineId}, #{usedBytes}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE usage_amount = usage_amount + VALUES(usage_amount), deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(6)
